data.title: WisdomTree launches tokenized private credit fund amid $16B market surge. Tokenized alternative funds gain traction in onchain finance shift.
data.description: The adoption of tokenized private credit and other alternative funds is steadily increasing, with a noticeable shift from the traditional financial system to blockchain technology. This transition is evidenced by a growing number of investors embracing tokenization for their alternative investments.

data.title: Wall Street hits new records, with Oracle's best rally since 1992 amidst surging investor confidence in Fed rate cuts. VO ETF reaches record highs. Inflation rises to 2.9% in August, reaching highest level since January, with jobless claims at 263,000, worst since October 2021, signaling labor market slowdown. Traders bet on lower interest rates. Market details on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Investor confidence in Federal Reserve rate cuts and expectations for robust growth in AI-driven companies propelled Wall Street to extend its record-breaking run, with the VOO ETF trading at all-time highs. Despite concerns over rising inflation hitting 2.9% in August, the highest level since January, and a sharp increase in jobless claims to 263,000 in the first week of September, the worst since October 2021, traders remain optimistic about lower interest rates. The labor market, as indicated by a lackluster August payrolls report, seems to be losing momentum. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dave's IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating increased to 96 from 94, reflecting positive growth for the digital banking platform.
data.description: On Friday, Dave's IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating increased to 96 from the previous day's 94. The rating improvement was noted for the digital banking platform Dave Stock. This update was highlighted in a post on Investor's Business Daily.
CFTC Positions in the Week Ended September 9th
Week Ahead: Economic Indicators 15th – 19th September (US)

data.title: Nasdaq reaches new high, Quantum stock surges with Gemini debut, while Dow lags. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average is trailing behind other prominent market indexes. Meanwhile, a company specializing in quantum computing experiences a significant surge in its stock value. Today's stock market performance showcases the Nasdaq reaching a record high, with a particular leap in the quantum stock as Gemini makes its debut. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: SURMOUNT brokers $17.7M industrial deal between PREH Berkshire & Cardinal Industrial for 264,793-sq-ft facility.
data.description: In Janesville, Wisconsin, a corrected release states that Surmount facilitated a $17.7 million net lease industrial transaction with Preh Berkshire and Cardinal Industrial. Serving as the representative for both the buyer and seller, the firm oversaw the acquisition of a 264,793-square-foot industrial facility. Surmount, a prominent full-service net lease real estate advisory and investment platform, successfully led the transaction.

data.title: World Design Organization wraps up World Design Congress 2025 in London after 3-day event, held from 9-11 Sept.
data.description: The World Design Organization (WDO)® has recently wrapped up its World Design Congress 2025, held in London (UK) from 9-11 September. In partnership with the Design Council, a WDO Promotional Member, this three-day hybrid event saw the participation of numerous professionals and enthusiasts.

data.title: Tyler Childers will headline ninth annual Buckeye Country Superfest on June 13, 2026 at Ohio Stadium with special guests.
data.description: Mark your calendars for the Buckeye Country Superfest happening on Saturday, June 13, 2026, at Ohio Stadium in Columbus, Ohio. This year's lineup features special guests including The Red Clay Strays, Lord Huron, Sierra Ferrell, Flatland Cavalry, and Kaitlin Butts. Tickets are currently on sale for this highly anticipated event. Previous editions of the festival have drawn large crowds, and with a diverse array of artists, this year's Superfest is shaping up to be another unforgettable experience. Don't miss out on the chance to attend this summer tradition.

data.title: HitPaw released VikPea V5.0.0 with UHD Restoration Model, Professional Models, and AI Colorist. #AI #multimedia
data.description: A multimedia software solutions innovator, HitPaw, revealed the launch of HitPaw VikPea V5.0.0 on September 12, 2025. This update marks the latest version of its all-in-one AI-driven video enhancement platform, previously known as HitPaw Video Enhancer.

data.title: HitPaw FotorPea V5.0.0 update introduces AI Replace, improved Face Restoration, and Smarter AI Painting.Chars: 98
data.description: In New York on September 12, 2025, HitPaw introduced the 5.0.0 update of its AI photo enhancement software, HitPaw FotorPea. This latest version includes AI Replace, an innovative editing feature, along with an improved face restoration model. The update aims to enhance user experience and offers advanced editing capabilities.

data.title: Mount Logan Capital Inc. merges with 180 Degree Capital Corp., forming strategic partnership. #businesscombination
data.description: An outbreak of a deadly virus has been reported in a city in China, with 300 confirmed cases and 10 deaths so far. The virus is believed to have originated from a seafood market in the city and can be transmitted between humans. Health authorities are working to contain the spread of the virus by implementing quarantine measures and increasing public awareness. The World Health Organization (WHO) has been alerted to the situation and is closely monitoring the developments. Residents in the city are advised to take precautions such as wearing masks and practicing good hygiene to prevent further transmission of the virus.

data.title: Millionaire trader prefers Dogecoin, Solana ETFs over XRP; views Bonk as high-potential meme coin with catalysts.
data.description: According to a wealthy meme coin trader, the cryptocurrency market is abuzz with various factors, such as the upcoming Dogecoin ETF and potential rate cuts. However, amidst this activity, a highly promising meme coin seems to have gone unnoticed. Recently, the trader highlighted that Bonk has surged out of a descending wedge pattern over several months with significant trading volume, a trend that typically indicates upcoming exponential price gains. He mentioned several positive factors contributing to this, including the introduction of Dogecoin and Bonk Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) and the expected approval...

data.title: Dickey's Barbecue Pit to open new location in Canyon City, CO at 127 Justice Center Rd, led by franchisee Bobby Rusnak.
data.description: In Canyon City, Colorado, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit, the largest barbecue concept globally, is gearing up for the opening of a new location at 127 Justice Center Rd, Unit T, Canyon City, CO 81212. The expansion is spearheaded by experienced Dickey’s franchisee Bobby Rusnak, who emphasizes that the new restaurant symbolizes more than just a business venture. As a longstanding member of the Dickey’s family, Rusnak views each new establishment as an opportunity to not only offer great barbecue but also to foster community growth.

data.title: Price predictions for 9/12: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, LINK, HYPE, SUI. Strong spot Bitcoin ETF inflows suggest bullish momentum towards $117,500, may impact altcoins too.
data.description: Significant investments are flowing into spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds, indicating persistent interest from investors expecting a rise above the $117,500 resistance level. This trend suggests a potential bullish momentum and raises the question of whether alternative cryptocurrencies will also experience a similar surge in demand.

data.title: Prediction market Polymarket plans US return with CFTC support, new funding, and potential $10B valuation amid rising market popularity.
data.description: Polymarket, a prediction market platform, is gearing up for a reintroduction in the US with a major boost from the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), fresh funding, and a potential valuation reaching $10 billion. This move comes as prediction markets are swiftly gaining traction in the financial landscape.

data.title: FDA approved Apple Watch Ultra 3's hypertension alerts. Pre-orders open with availability on Sept. 19.
data.description: Apple Inc. unveiled the Apple Watch Ultra 3 on Tuesday, which can now be pre-ordered and will be officially available starting Friday, Sept. 19. The U.S Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved Apple's new hypertension notification feature, with the system set to be released after receiving FDA clearance on Thursday. This feature on the Apple Watch utilizes data from the optical heart sensor to monitor how a user's blood vessels react to the heart's beats. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Medra launches new Continuous Science Platform integrating robotics and AI to accelerate data generation for scientific discovery.
data.description: In San Francisco, a startup named Medra unveiled its groundbreaking Continuous Science Platform, designed to revolutionize scientific data generation and discovery by merging robotics and AI technology. This platform is the first of its kind and aims to address the issue of data scarcity in the scientific field. Unlike other models relying on vast datasets, Medra's system focuses on utilizing Physical AI for experimentation. The startup's vision is centered on the idea that overcoming data scarcity is crucial for AI to effectively combat diseases in the future.
